title: Just a simple question
wikitext:
[]: Just a simple question             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 20, 2005 1:30 pm How many times is god mentioned in eva? I know Maya said " god have mercy we have begun thrid impact. ", and old man Fuyutsuki ponders if " man was trying to creat a coone of god ". Are these the only refrences to god directly in the sheries and movies?

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Jul 20, 2005 2:06 pm why do you need to know this? god is a word commonly used in everyday language, so it would be no surprise if it came up in evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 20, 2005 2:11 pm Just wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Wed Jul 20, 2005 4:14 pm I think that "God" is more commonly heard in the dub than "Kami" is heard in the sub, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 20, 2005 8:25 pm Kami is a Shinto concept that is rather foreign to Western sensibilities. (Even I don't really understand it, heh.) Tsurumaki explains the difference a little in the FLCL commentary (in the scene where Mamimi calls Canti "kami-sama", I b'lieve). Kami 'translates' into English as "god" because no other word close to the concept really exists -- except perhaps "spirit" or something, but "spirit" can mean about a dozen different things in English as it is. Anywho, if you want to see kami -kami, watch Miyazaki flicks, like "Totoro", "Mononoke", and "Spirited". But I digress. The translation problem goes both ways, and the best equivalent to "God" in Japanese is, of course, kami . So you have to figure out from context exactly what is being talked about. Since NGE has nothing to do with Shinto (we see one jinja, and that's it) and everything to do with old, Kabbalistic maniacs, it's obvious that they're using the more Western definition -- which is sort of odd, since Kabbalah is an offshoot of Judaism (and even has Christian applications), and the word "god" isn't something to be thrown around the way they do in NGE. Minor detail, I suppose. :P

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Jul 20, 2005 9:41 pm Google has shown us the path

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Jul 21, 2005 4:25 am Some time ago I needed to search where certain words appeared on Eva. I was tired of searching scripts one by one or make an inmense text file. So I made a little application called "Eva Script Search", where you make a collection of scripts divided by what parts of the story they cover, translator, etc... And then, choose which collections to use, press search and ready. Here are some screencaps. The word God appears on episodes 11, 12, 13, 14, 20, 21(*6), 22 and 23(*4) of the Literal Translation Project scripts covering the 26 TV eps. On episodes 21'(*8), 22', 23'(*4), 24'(*2) on that mix of LTP and EvaOtaku's DC scene translation. And one time on #25', two times in #26' of Evaotaku's EOE script. Those are all the scripts I have that I can use on this app.
